callout.p: 源码校准补充（2026-06-04）：本节原有图更偏未来生产架构。下面这张图按当前仓库真实实现补齐模块框图，便于区分“已实现”和“目标演进”。源码依据：package.json、server/index.ts、server/store.ts、server/runtime.ts、server/runner.ts、src/App.tsx。

whiteboard:
flowchart TB Browser[React Console
src/App.tsx] -- fetch / EventSource --> API[Express API
server/index.ts] CLI[magcli
scripts/magcli.mjs] -- REST --> API SDK[Local SDK
sdk/index.mjs] -- REST --> API API -- auth/session --> Auth[Auth + requireAuth
server/auth.ts] API -- CRUD --> Store[SQLite Store
server/store.ts] API -- model proxy --> Gateway[Model Gateway
server/modelGateway.ts] API -- session events --> Runner[Agent Runner
server/runner.ts] Runner -- chat completion --> Provider[OpenAI-compatible Provider
server/provider.ts] Runner -- tool execution --> Runtime[Sandbox Runtime
server/runtime.ts] Runtime -- choose --> Docker[Docker workspace] Runtime -- choose --> E2B[E2B Sandbox / Desktop] Runtime -- artifacts sync --> Artifacts[Host artifacts/workspaces
server/artifacts.ts] Store -- secret refs --> Secrets[Secret Store
server/secrets.ts] SkillScan[Skill Scanner / Writer] --> Store SkillScan -- files --> SkillFiles[Agent skill files]

flowchart LR App[src/App.tsx] --> ApiClient[src/api.ts] ApiClient --> Index[server/index.ts routes] Index --> Store[server/store.ts] Index --> Runner[server/runner.ts] Index --> AgentBuilder[server/agentBuilder.ts] Index --> Gateway[server/modelGateway.ts] Index --> SkillScanner[server/skillScanner.ts] Index --> SkillFiles[server/skillFiles.ts] Runner --> Provider[server/provider.ts] Runner --> Runtime[server/runtime.ts] Runtime --> Artifacts[server/artifacts.ts] Runtime --> SandboxConfig[server/sandboxConfig.ts] Gateway --> Secrets[server/secrets.ts] Store --> Types[server/types.ts] SDK[sdk/index.mjs] --> Index CLI[scripts/magcli.mjs] --> Index
